title: bus of wreal (packed array) not supported

features.name: wreal packed array as module port
features.description: Code should include a module port declaration using wreal (real-valued wire) as a packed array, such as input or output wreal [3:0] data;

features.name: packed array of wreal net type
features.description: Code should include a wreal net declared as a packed array, such as wreal [3:0] bus; where wreal is Verilator's real-valued wire type
